profile.name: Mahendra Etampawala
profile.profileCaption: // hunting bugs in prod, one test at a time

hero.headlineTail: so your users don't have to.
hero.description: Quality Assurance Engineer with hands-on experience in manual, automated, API, and load testing. I hunt bugs, design robust test strategies, and help teams ship software that actually works.

paragraphs: A committed and capable Quality Assurance Engineer with experience in manual and automated testing methodologies — including API testing (Postman) and load / performance testing (Apache JMeter).
A passionate, self-motivated individual who strives to stay on top of emerging technologies and industry trends to ensure our products remain ahead of the curve.

experience.description: Designing, developing, and executing test cases based on requirements and user stories. Driving flow automation with Playwright, mentoring interns and junior team members, and leading the implementation of quality standards across the team.

Designed, developed, and executed test cases based on requirements and user stories. Identified, reported, and tracked bugs — ensuring prompt resolution through close communication with development teams.

Designed and executed both automated and manual test cases. Implemented and maintained automated test scripts using industry-standard tools. Conducted regression, functional, and exploratory testing, and led the creation of quality standards for the team.

Assisted in the design and execution of automated and manual test cases. Gained experience creating and maintaining test scripts under senior guidance, and contributed to sprint planning, stand-ups, and reviews to keep testing aligned with project goals.

projects.title: Camms — Project Management Platform
projects.description: Currently working as QA Engineer at Camms, testing an enterprise project management platform that helps organisations plan, track, and deliver projects, portfolios, and strategic initiatives. Driving end-to-end Playwright automation, API testing, and leading quality standards across the team.

projects.title: Ekyc Seylan Solution
projects.description: Tested a mobile eKYC (Know Your Customer) solution for Seylan Bank covering identity verification flows, backend APIs, and cross-platform mobile behaviour.

projects.title: Parliament DMS
projects.description: QA on the Parliament Document Management System — a large-scale government platform for handling parliamentary documents and workflows.

projects.title: Revenue Department Web Portal
projects.description: Tested a government revenue web portal covering tax workflows, reporting, and secure data handling.

projects.title: Office For Reformation IMS
projects.description: Information Management System for the Office For Reformation. Executed functional, regression, and exploratory testing.

projects.title: Ulpatha Ecommerce
projects.description: E-commerce platform for Ulpatha — QA covering cart, checkout, payment flows, and admin backoffice.

projects.title: Valuation Department Web Portal
projects.description: Government valuation department web application — tested end-to-end workflows and cross-browser compatibility.

projects.title: Tropical Fish International
projects.description: QA on Liveaquaria — an aquarium and marine life e-commerce platform serving international customers.

projects.title: Timetable Management System
projects.description: Java desktop application built with JavaFX and SQLite to automate university timetable and scheduling workflows.

projects.title: Vehicle Rental System
projects.description: Fully functional web application for managing vehicle rentals — bookings, users, and admin dashboards.

projects.title: Hospital Management System
projects.description: Desktop application for managing hospital operations — patient records, appointments, and staff workflows.

projects.title: OAS — Attendance Marking App
projects.description: Mobile application for GPS-based attendance marking, built with Flutter for cross-platform deployment.

education.title: BSc (Hons) in Information Technology
education.institution: Sri Lanka Institute of Information Technology · Colombo

references.name: Mr. Dilan Chathuranga
references.role: Senior QA Engineer · Epic Lanka Group

interests.title: Cricket
interests.detail: Former club-level player at Kandy Cricket Academy
